_note: Maps a workflows.json guard NAME to an enforceable precondition check. workflows.json is the SINGLE SOURCE for guards (declared per transition); this file only says HOW to enforce a named guard. gen_guards.py reads each transition's guards[] and emits server/lib/transitionPreconditions.ts from these mappings. A guard declared in workflows but absent here is reported as 'declared but UNMAPPED' (a tracked enforcement gap) — never silently skipped.

school_active.error: School must be active to proceed.
